programme.title: E4 - A Magical Sky Adventure!
programme.desc: Go on a magical sky adventure with Twinkle! First, discover the variety of cloud shapes & sizes, from triangles & squares to star-shaped clouds! Then, daydream high in the clouds with Twinkle & Mr. Moon, where her magical stardust makes the moon sneeze & keeps changing colors! The sky-high fun continues as Twinkle soars through the sky on a magical journey to explore all the vibrant colors of the rainbow.

programme.title: E4 - A Big Day of Imagination & Play
programme.desc: Get ready for a big day of imagination & play with Mia & Max! First, they decide to let their imagination run free & build a big dollhouse, but Max has more fun pretending to be a dinosaur that knocks it down! Then, Daddy & Twinkle show the kids how much fun can be had with shadow puppets, making all sorts of different animal shapes. The imaginative fun continues as they turn five empty green bottles into fuzzy-armed monsters that Twinkle brings to life!

programme.title: E2 - Pitch Perfect Playtime Party
programme.desc: Come to a playtime party with Mia and her friends! Roll and bounce with Twinkle the magic ball, find the courage to jump into a giant ball pit, and pretend to be hopping kangaroos. End the day with a fun dance party where everyone shakes their bums!

programme.title: E4 - Buster’s Big Football Match
programme.desc: Join Buster for a big day of soccer! He's excited to play, but learns that being a team player is the real way to win. Help Buster overcome his nerves, score a goal, and show that having fun with friends is the best prize of all!

programme.title: E5 - An Adventure, Pedals, Rescue & Stars!
programme.desc: Join the Minibods for an adventure with pedals, rescues & stars! Lulu goes camping but realizes she's left her favorite Binky Bunny behind & has to learn how to cope. Then, Newt goes on an adventure to find a real-life Flutterbug, but she has to be brave when her bike's stabilizers come off! The adventures continue as Jeff overcomes his fear of mud to rescue his feather duster & Bubbles builds a rocket to try & reach a big purple star in the sky!

programme.title: E4 - Buster’s Big Football Match
programme.desc: Join Buster for a big day of soccer! He's excited to play, but learns that being a team player is the real way to win. Help Buster overcome his nerves, score a goal, and show that having fun with friends is the best prize of all!

programme.title: E2 - Healthy Habits & Happy You!
programme.desc: It's time to learn some healthy habits to keep you happy! First, Grandma Mei makes sure everyone washes their hands with lots of bubbles before eating some yummy dumplings. Then, when Baby Izzy doesn't want to eat her vegetables, Mei uses a bit of magic to make the veggies come to life to sing & dance! The healthy habits continue as the friends learn how to recycle trash to help save the planet & Ella learns to get right back up after getting a boo boo.

programme.title: E4 - Buster’s Big Football Match
programme.desc: Join Buster for a big day of soccer! He's excited to play, but learns that being a team player is the real way to win. Help Buster overcome his nerves, score a goal, and show that having fun with friends is the best prize of all!

programme.title: E2 - Funny Feelings & Creative Fixes!
programme.desc: It's a day of funny feelings & creative fixes! A worried Dandy brings Fiona to the garage because her lights & sirens aren't working. Gecko discovers no fix is needed because Fiona is just feeling sad inside. Then, when Blue is anxious about school because Bobby doesn't look like the bus in his book, Gecko comes up with a creative plan to let the Mechs paint Bobby! Plus, Gecko finds a creative way to deal with a swarm of bees that have nested in Trevor's engine.

programme.title: E5 - Super Creative Day of Play
programme.desc: Get ready for a super creative day of play with Twinkle! First, it's time to get musical! Each toadstool makes a different musical note, allowing Twinkle & Sandy the Seagull to create a musical tune. Then, get creative as Twinkle has fun painting a picture of what she sees. The fun continues as Twinkle shares a box full of super fun toys, & her friends learn how to play new musical instruments!

programme.title: E2 - Pitch Perfect Playtime Party
programme.desc: Come to a playtime party with Mia and her friends! Roll and bounce with Twinkle the magic ball, find the courage to jump into a giant ball pit, and pretend to be hopping kangaroos. End the day with a fun dance party where everyone shakes their bums!

programme.title: E4 - A Big Day of Imagination & Play
programme.desc: Get ready for a big day of imagination & play with Mia & Max! First, they decide to let their imagination run free & build a big dollhouse, but Max has more fun pretending to be a dinosaur that knocks it down! Then, Daddy & Twinkle show the kids how much fun can be had with shadow puppets, making all sorts of different animal shapes. The imaginative fun continues as they turn five empty green bottles into fuzzy-armed monsters that Twinkle brings to life!

programme.title: E2 - Pitch Perfect Playtime Party

programme.title: E4 - A Magical Sky Adventure!
programme.desc: Go on a magical sky adventure with Twinkle! First, discover the variety of cloud shapes & sizes, from triangles & squares to star-shaped clouds! Then, daydream high in the clouds with Twinkle & Mr. Moon, where her magical stardust makes the moon sneeze & keeps changing colors! The sky-high fun continues as Twinkle soars through the sky on a magical journey to explore all the vibrant colors of the rainbow.

programme.title: Paris direct : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: Un flux d'actualités en continu pour suivre en temps réel les breaking news, les sujets tendances et les analyses sur la culture, la santé, la technologie et l'environnement. Reste informé de tout ce qui compte, au moment où cela se passe en continu 24/7.

programme.title: Le club Paris direct[Live]
programme.desc: Des experts issus de la géopolitique, des sciences de l'environnement, des sciences sociales et de la culture se réunissent pour analyser et débattre des sujets majeurs qui dominent l'actualité. Leurs échanges offrent des clés de compréhension sur les enjeux contemporains et leurs impacts.

programme.title: Bhabi Ji Ghar Par Hai! E1
programme.desc: In this hilarious comedy, two neighboring couples, the Mishras and the Tiwaris, navigate the chaos that ensues when each husband develops a crush on the other's wife!

programme.title: Saru E15
programme.desc: A kabaddi champion from Rajasthan moves to Mumbai to chase her dreams. Along the way, she reunites with her family and fights hard to earn her mother the respect she truly deserves.

programme.title: Vasudha E16
programme.desc: Vasudha, a cheerful maid, joins business leader Chandrika's home. Despite differing beliefs, she seeks Chandrika's approval and struggles to fit into her elite world.

programme.title: Brahma Kumaris E496
programme.desc: Seeking inner peace? Join Brahma Kumari's Podcast for wisdom on meditation, positivity, and overcoming life's challenges with spiritual growth.

programme.title: Jagadhatri E216
programme.desc: A daughter's fight for dignity and an intelligence officer's war for truth, Jagadhatri's dual life embodies strength, sacrifice and the relentless pursuit of justice.

programme.title: Ganga Mai Ki Betiyan E271
programme.desc: Ganga Mai, abandoned for bearing daughters, defies norms with fierce love and dignity, raising three girls who each forge bold, individual paths shaped by their dreams and inner fire.

programme.title: Tumm Se Tumm Tak E341
programme.desc: Anu, a kind 20-year-old, and Aryavardhan, a resolute 45-year-old businessman, defy societal norms and family resistance, overcoming struggles to demonstrate that love transcends age or boundaries.

programme.title: E110 - Spaceship
programme.desc: Tim and Kai attempt to rebuild Dad's childhood spaceship.

programme.title: E907 - Pups Solve The Mystery Of The Missing Art
programme.desc: When all the paintings mysteriously disappear from the Art Museum festival, the PAW Patrol must solve the Missing Art Mystery and return all the paintings.

programme.title: E202 - Super Dad / Time Out / Cookies
programme.desc: Tim sets out to prove Kai's Dad is Captain DinoStar // Tim tries to relax, but Tia has other ideas // Tim gets the best cookies in town but soon finds that others need them more than him

programme.title: E112 - Bicycles
programme.desc: Daddy Pig has grown a huge pumpkin and Peppa is riding her bike, but says she wants to ride without training wheels. But soon she crashes into the pumpkin.

programme.title: E518 - Video Game Heroes
programme.desc: Blaze and AJ are super excited to play their new video game. But when a video game wizard makes the game come alive, Blaze and AJ must level up and save Axle City from pixel pandemonium

programme.title: E124 - Barbazoo Can't Say ''no'' / The Doppelganger
programme.desc: Barbazoo is ready to help. But Barbabright and Barbabelle abuse his kindness and drive him crazy. // By chance, Barbazoo realizes he can imitate Barbapapa. He uses this opportunity to distribute chores to his brothers and sisters. Will they find out?

programme.title: E105 - The Crew Builds A Car Wash / The Crew Plans Grandpa Day
programme.desc: Mayor Greatway needs her muddy motorcycle cleaned fast! Wheeler and the pups jump into action to build a solution before the big race. // It's Grandpa Gravel's special day! But when the pups are needed, they have to change their Grandpa Day plans.

programme.title: E112 - The Crew Does A Home Renovation / The Crew Builds A Lighthouse
programme.desc: The pups are starstruck when their favorite TV renovation star, Hank Hammer, comes to see them at work. // Cap'n Turbot is bringing Mayor Greatway a big surprise. But when a thick fog rolls in, the pups have to build a lighthouse fast!

programme.title: E410 - Octo-Swiper / Tudos Juntos
programme.desc: Dora stops a frantic octopus Swiper and saves the Pearl Day Party! // Dora meets Raquel the Rock Lobster and helps her get the missing instruments back in time to play at the big music show!

programme.title: E601 - Big Rig To The Rescue!
programme.desc: When three big deliveries are needed all over Axle City, there's only one monster machine with the power to haul it all: Big Rig Blaze! But even Big Rig Blaze may not be able to make all the deliveries in time.

programme.title: E209 - Times Machine / Super Tim / Uncle Tiberius
programme.desc: Tim and Tia build a time machine to avoid telling Dad the truth. // Tim goes to DinoStar's training academy, but is confused by his hero's training methods. // Uncle Tiberius comes to visit the Rexes, and Tim must be on his best behaviour.

programme.title: E104 - Making Bread / From One Pit To Another
programme.desc: Barbapapa wants to teach his children to make bread, but things don't go as planned... // The Barbababies plant an avocado tree. However, it takes years before the first harvest. Barbabright has an idea to save time that may well lead to...disaster.

programme.title: E119 - New Shoes
programme.desc: Peppa loses her shoes, but she gets new red ones. Now she is so happy in them, that she refuses to take them off.

programme.title: E1 - Sirga, Loki and Hugger
programme.desc: Walk on the wild side with Sirga the lion, whose human pal, Val, has been by her side since she was an orphaned cub. See Loki the raven entertain his BFF Elliott, cuddle with Hugger the stingray, and see why Trish and Garri the koala are like family.

programme.title: E3 - Hide and Seek
programme.desc: Contend with the challenges of the rainy season, which turns everything green and spoils the lions’ camouflage. Watch Einstein fail to make new connections and weigh the pros and cons when Keeza and her cub are kidnapped by rival male Mad-Eye Moody.

programme.title: E1 - Trials of Olimba
programme.desc: Enter the heart of Zambia’s Luangwa Valley, where shady woodlands and antelope-packed plains offer the perfect hunting grounds for an audacious female leopard named Olimba and the pack she must struggle to control.

programme.title: E6 - California
programme.desc: The beaches of California are some of the most beautiful in the world, but are they falling out of balance due to mankind’s effects on nature? What does it take for the magnificent fauna of the Pacific Coast to keep living… on the “living beach”?

programme.title: E2 - Coasts
programme.desc: Venture along Earth’s coasts, where colliding worlds create a melting pot of biodiversity. Watch orcas hunt with precision, hold on as guillemot chicks take leaps of faith, crawl to safety with turtle hatchlings, and see crabs sculpt sandy galaxies.

programme.title: E2 - Albert, Herbie and Quincy
programme.desc: Do rounds on the ranch that Albert the camel runs with his human friend Alex, then check in with Herbie the wallaby as he gets pampered by his pal Fleur. Cause a little chaos with Quincy the quoll and hang ten with Chupacabra the surfing goat.

programme.title: E2 - Brothers in Arms
programme.desc: The Nsefu lion pride welcomes seven new cubs during the wet season, when antelope and buffalo are spread far from the river, making them harder to hunt. Learn how the mother lionesses work to keep the boisterous cubs alive.

programme.title: E1 - Monkey Garden
programme.desc: Explore the southern edge of the Pantanal, where brown capuchin monkeys live in their own Garden of Eden. Dry season in the highlands treats them well until a drought dries up their food sources. Can an industrious agouti save them from starvation?

programme.title: ETV Special 'Hibakusha: The Path To Nuclear Abolition'
programme.desc: Tomonaga Masao, a hibakusha and physician, has long studied the effects of radiation while advocating for nuclear abolition. As global nuclear tensions rise once again, he travels to the United States with fellow hibakusha to call for a world free of nuclear weapons. Their mission is to engage in dialogue with people holding different views. In Los Alamos, a center of nuclear development, they meet with researchers, and in Pearl Harbor, they attend a memorial ceremony and encounter survivors. Through these exchanges, they explore possible new pathways toward nuclear abolition.

programme.title: My Gardening

programme.title: E57
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: ETV Special 'Hibakusha: The Path To Nuclear Abolition'
programme.desc: Tomonaga Masao, a hibakusha and physician, has long studied the effects of radiation while advocating for nuclear abolition. As global nuclear tensions rise once again, he travels to the United States with fellow hibakusha to call for a world free of nuclear weapons. Their mission is to engage in dialogue with people holding different views. In Los Alamos, a center of nuclear development, they meet with researchers, and in Pearl Harbor, they attend a memorial ceremony and encounter survivors. Through these exchanges, they explore possible new pathways toward nuclear abolition.

programme.title: E63
programme.desc: A meticulous and intense revenge chronicle in which two women return under false identities to uncover the truths and sins hidden within the Adel family.

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: The thoroughly city-bred Seong Taehun family suddenly finds themselves in the pristine yet unpredictable village of Yeonri-ri. Determined to return to Seoul, they face hilarious challenges, cultural clashes, and heartwarming moments. This family “reboot” drama captures their misadventures, resilience, and the unexpected bonds they form along the way.

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: The drama is the first 'historic science' drama that has been produced in Korea. This drama depicts the successful life story of the scientist Jang Youngsil that contributed to the development and accomplishment of Joseon's science during the 15th century. In particular, the drama emphasizes his accomplishment through showing the restrictions and difficulties he experienced due to his social class as a slave. Moreover, the drama aims to depict Jang Youngsil as the role model of 'Korea's youth of the 21st century' through displaying his scientific accomplishments. The drama also expects to stimulate scientific curiosity amongst audiences and help them easily understand the fundamental principles of science by utilizing various data and scientific videos.

programme.title: The Seasons W
programme.desc: A talk show brings you music and stories that will 'get rid of all your worries and all your concerns.'

programme.title: Blood Vs. Duty[Live]
programme.desc: Two brothers separated in a maritime tragedy grow up on opposite sides of the law - one a dedicated Intelligence Officer, the other fiercely protective of the Tausug family that raised him. When a corruption case pits them against each other, their long-buried secret threatens to ignite a war between blood and loyalty.

programme.title: The Alibi[Live]
programme.desc: Vincent, an heir to a news empire, gets accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real as their shared wounds and ambitions draw them together. But when they uncover the truth, the two are compelled to confront their true feelings.

programme.title: It's Showtime[Live]
programme.desc: The venue for Pinoys to strut and display their unique talents for all the world to see. Led by a powerhouse cast of popular celebrities - Vhong Navarro, Anne Curtis, Ogie Alcasid, Karylle, Jhong Hilario and Vice Ganda to name a few.

programme.title: Goin' Bulilit S15[Live]
programme.desc: A gag show with child actors playing adult roles, doing gags, sketches and segments. Instead of playing roles based on their own age, child actors are made to portray adult characters like Doctors, Teachers, Married Couples, etc.

programme.title: Linlang
programme.desc: Victor Lualhati, a former boxer turned seaman, discovers signs of his wife Juliana's infidelity and begins a personal investigation. As he digs deeper, Victor uncovers a web of deception involving powerful figures and family secrets, realizing that the affair is only part of a much larger and more dangerous conspiracy.

programme.title: 2 Good 2 Be True[Live]
programme.desc: Ali, a hardworking nurse with big dreams, crosses paths with Eloy, a clever mechanic secretly living a double life as a con artist and law student. Their rocky first meeting leads to an unexpected partnership involving a wealthy old man, hidden identities, family secrets, and emotional healing. As love grows amid deception, the series explores trust, redemption, and second chances, blending romance, comedy, and drama.

Baogu At the Movie
programme.desc: Baogu At The Movie brings you the most exclusive behind the scenes of recent local blockbusters. The most true story and sincere conversation behind every piece of dreamwork.

programme.title: Komada - A Whisky Family
programme.desc: Kotaro, a novice editor for a web news, visits Komada Distillery for a project on Japanese craft whisky. Led by a young female president Rui who recently took over the family business, the distillery works hard to reproduce its signature whisky KOMA they had to stop making years ago. KOMA was a brand that Rui's family had lovingly preserved over generations and a symbol of happiness for all. However, not to mention financial backing, too many clues are missing to revive the whisky once lost. Rui, Kotaro, and the distillery supporters pull together every thread to bring back the whisky filled with family memories.

E24
programme.desc: 無論過去、現在、未來，每個別具意義的相遇都造就華麗的日子，且無論什麼人都曾經擁有過華麗的日子。事業、愛情兩得意的能力者李志赫遇上責任感強陽光開朗的咖啡廳經理兼室內設計師池恩悟。兩人儘管外表看似光鮮亮麗，但在經歷人生的低潮後仍守在對方身邊，克服各種試驗，找到人生的真諦。

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: 有著「洪吉童」封號的女義賊洪恩祖（南志鉉 飾）專偷貪官的財富，為百姓謀取福祉，怎料在她受到道月大君李烈（文相敏 飾）追捕時，兩人竟然意外互換靈魂！在互換靈魂的期間，兩人拋開成見重新認識彼此，一起攜手守護百姓，最終收穫珍貴的愛情。

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: 講述世界排名第一的拳擊選手李權淑在令全韓國為之瘋狂後突然引退並銷聲匿跡；某一天體育經理人的出現並提出了一個讓她無法拒絕的復出提議，而隨之發生的故事。

programme.desc: Walt Disney overcomes immense obstacles to create the first theme park, where instead of thrill rides, he gives the visitor an immersive journey into a story, like the experience of being inside a movie.

programme.title: Down To Earth[Live]
programme.desc: Down To Earth presents people behind fascinating environmental, health and technological innovations in a bid for sustainable solutions to our changing world. The program draws viewers' attention to ecological responsibility and highlights latest solutions to pollution and waste problems all over the world.

programme.desc: Watch the latest international top stories, The News every 30 minutes with the emphasis on debate, dialogue, role of cultural differences, analytics of key events all over the world, comments, hot topics of the day, reports.

programme.title: The Debate[Live]
programme.desc: Live debate show on the key topic of the day with four guests from different spots of the globe, from Monday to Thursday. Keep up with up-to-date issues from all over the world in politics, culture, sports, economy and healthcare. Get the latest facts and expert opinions about the most essential stories happening around us and draw your own conclusions. The show is well known for its dynamics due to live debates with its various guests.

programme.title: Focus[Live]
programme.desc: Keep up with the latest news from all over the globe with Focus on France 24. Focus programme provides exclusive reports from Monday to Friday at 7.50 am Paris time. Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.title: Eye On Africa[Live]
programme.desc: Join Georja Calvin-Smith for all the news from Africa and the Maghreb, together with France 24's correspondents and guests of the show. Eye on Africa is on every week day twice a day. Have a look at African life and find out what is going on there in the sphere of politics, health care, business. Get to know how global affairs influence its top events and be the first to experience its colorful exotic culture.

Keep up with up-to-date issues from all over the world in politics, culture, sports, economy and healthcare. Get the latest facts and expert opinions about the most essential stories happening around us and draw your own conclusions. The show is well known for its dynamics due to live debates with its various guests.

programme.title: E1 - The Great Barrier Reef
programme.desc:
World champion freediver Marina Kazankova is on a mission, to free dive the Great Barrier Reef.
Capable of holding her breath for 7-minutes at a time, Marina travels to the iconic reef, swimming with turtles and giant groper, diving on ship wrecks and through awesome caves, all on a single breath of air.
Capturing each challenge in glorious 4K, this series brings you face to face with the very best of the Great Barrier Reef’s corals and creatures.

programme.title: E1 - Joe and Shelley With AJ
programme.desc: High school sweethearts Joe and Shelly want a log home where they can live off the grid; real estate agent AJ helps them find their dream home.

programme.title: E7 - Chase the Sun
programme.desc: Red Bull are known for their crazy events and have asked the team to do their latest version, Chase the Sun. A gruelling 24 hour team challenge to try and cover 350 km.

programme.title: E8 - Hyrox
programme.desc: The hottest new sport of hybrid games sweeping the world is Hyrox, so the team puts their fitness to the test in Melbourne.

programme.title: E7 - Chinese Mystery Snails
programme.desc: In the crystal clear lakes of Northern Wisconsin lurks a peculiar creature... the Chinese Mystery Snail which gets its namesake from female snails giving birth to young, fully developed snails that suddenly and 'mysteriously' appear. Utilized for its high protein, low fat content in China, the mystery snail is a food source believed to aid in treatment of digestive disease. Eager to explore this feral snail as a food source, Yia travels to Clear Lake to meet up with Wisconsin Fisheries Specialist Titus Seilheimer, who's seen first hand the explosion of these snails at his family's lakefront resort.

programme.title: E8 - Axis Deer
programme.desc: Yia travels to Texas to hunt arguably the tastiest of all deer. Native to India, the Axis deer were introduced in Texas in 1932 as a prized game meat for ranchers. The Texas hill country turned out to be the perfect habitat for Axis deer, who quickly escaped their high fence ranches, establishing a healthy wild breeding population. Now with over 150,000 Axis deer roaming the hill country, these deer are competing with native white tail deer for resources. Local rancher Chris Hughes has a solution- a mobile harvesting trailer where he culls wild Axis deer from overpopulated farms. Chris will show Yia how harvesting this species has become a full-time business and delicious solution.

Local rancher Chris Hughes has a solution- a mobile harvesting trailer where he culls wild Axis deer from overpopulated farms. Chris will show Yia how harvesting this species has become a full-time business and delicious solution.

programme.title: E7 - Chinese Mystery Snails
programme.desc: In the crystal clear lakes of Northern Wisconsin lurks a peculiar creature... the Chinese Mystery Snail which gets its namesake from female snails giving birth to young, fully developed snails that suddenly and 'mysteriously' appear. Utilized for its high protein, low fat content in China, the mystery snail is a food source believed to aid in treatment of digestive disease. Eager to explore this feral snail as a food source, Yia travels to Clear Lake to meet up with Wisconsin Fisheries Specialist Titus Seilheimer, who's seen first hand the explosion of these snails at his family's lakefront resort.

programme.title: E13
programme.desc: 故事講述了周筱風（趙又廷 飾）、方筱然（毛曉彤 飾）和林逸（金世佳 飾）三位心臟科醫生機緣巧合下，在東立醫院心臟中心相遇。三人因專業背景、職業理念不同而產生摩擦碰撞，隨後在治病救人的過程中逐漸磨合達成默契，最終在生命戰場並肩作戰的故事。

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: 年輕狀元郎陸江來上任淳寧縣令後屢破奇案，卻因捲入一樁殺妻舊案，從官場新星淪落至絕境。瀕死之際，幸得茶王之女榮善寶搭救。兩人聯手整頓家族、開拓茶道，在茶園裡締結了一段愛情佳話。

programme.title: E52
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: The Movie Star Says -Chan Hing Kai
programme.desc: Since the 1980's, Chan Hing Kai has created numerous love comedies, yet he opened up that he was “forced” to write them at that time. Later on, he wrote and co-directed “La Brassiere”, a film which entertains without being obscene. He reveals that one of the leading actor, Lau Ching Wan, complained to him afterwards... In this episode, Hing Kai is invited to share the untold stories from his writing career and talk about the changing ecology of screenwriting in the film industry.
